name: Quiche Peggy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp. Drain and crumble it into the bottom of the pie shell. Set aside 2 slices for topping.
2. Sprinkle grated cheese over the bacon.
3. Sauté the green onions in bacon drippings (optional, for added spice). Drain and sprinkle over the cheese.
4. Beat together eggs, half & half, milk, salt, pepper, cayenne pepper, and dry mustard.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Sprinkle the reserved crumbled bacon on top.
7. Cut into wedges to serve, or cut into finger-sized pieces for a party appetizer.
